ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team's home city and state */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the ranking belongs to */,
  "rivals_rank" INTEGER /* Rivals recruiting ranking */,
  "scout_rank" INTEGER /* Scout recruiting ranking */,
  "247_rank" INTEGER /* 247 recruiting ranking */,
  "espn_rank" INTEGER /* ESPN recruiting ranking */,
  "average_rank" REAL /* Average recruiting ranking */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the ranking */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season (e.g., fall, spring) */,
  "recruiting_class" INTEGER /* Year of the recruiting class */,
  "recruiting_total" INTEGER /* Total number of recruits */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ranking data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the player (e.g., 5-star, 4-star) */,
  "commit_status" TEXT /* Commit status of the player (e.g., committed, uncommitted) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the player */,
  "recruiting_class" INTEGER /* Year of the player's recruiting class */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date the player committed to the team */,
  "decommit_date" TEXT /* Date the player decommitted from the team (if applicable) */,
  "recruiting_status" TEXT /* Detailed status (e.g., signed, enrolled, verbal) */,
  "recruiting_source" TEXT /* Source of the recruiting data (e.g., Rivals, Scout) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the player's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, administrator) */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "accessed_data_type" TEXT /* Type of data accessed (e.g., rankings, players) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
